name: dice-roller
description: Polyhedral dice roller with full D&D notation support, advantage/disadvantage, critical hit detection, exploding dice, and roll history tracking. Handles any dice expression from a simple d20 to complex damage rolls like 8d6+3d8+5.
author: Cocapn

commands.name: roll
commands.description: Roll dice using standard notation (NdN+N format)

commands.name: roll:attack
commands.description: Roll an attack with advantage/disadvantage support and automatic critical detection

commands.name: roll:damage
commands.description: Roll damage dice, doubling on crits when flagged

commands.name: roll:stats
commands.description: Roll a set of ability scores using 4d6 drop lowest

commands.name: roll:history
commands.description: Show recent roll history with timestamps

commands.name: roll:fate
commands.description: Roll a d20 and describe the narrative result
commands.example: roll:fate stealth check in the goblin camp

notation.keep: NdNkhN (keep highest N), NdNklN (keep lowest N)
notation.drop: NdNdlN (drop lowest N), NdNdhN (drop highest N)

criticalHit.description: A natural 20 always hits and doubles the weapon's damage dice
